subject: feat(forecast): add statistical forecasting, daily cashflow chart, accuracy tracking
body:
Add EMA and rolling-average statistical models for variable-spend forecasting,
daily cashflow chart with ApexCharts, actuals-gated variance display, and
internal daily forecast accuracy tracking.

New engines:
- forecast.ts: EMA (alpha=0.3, 3+ months), rolling average, daily expansion
- accuracy.ts: daily forecast vs actual comparison, MAPE metrics (hidden from users)

New component:
- CashflowChart.vue: ApexCharts line chart with cumulative/daily-net toggle
  and optional forecast overlay

Modified:
- ProjectedTab: Table/Chart toggle, loads actuals for chart data
- CompareTab: variance gated on hasAnyActuals, shows empty state until upload
- variance.ts: added hasAnyActuals and actualsDateRange to ComparisonResult

Tags: forecast, chart, accuracy, variance, apexcharts
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: forecasting-enhancement
Semver: minor
